conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
# Pre-Game Reflection

I felt most connected to B, F, and G. With B, we had an immediate understanding about the need to cooperate strategically while staying realistic about self-interest—there was a real honesty in that conversation. F and I bonded over shared desperation and agreed to keep each other grounded, which felt genuine. G stood out because we made a specific alliance and promised to be straight with each other no matter what happens. I felt least connected to E, mainly because our conversation was more surface-level and transactional—we talked about strategy but didn't establish the same kind of personal trust or commitment that I built with others.

I made informal agreements with multiple people to touch base after the rules are explained and to look out for each other once the game starts. With B, F, G, and C especially, I committed to staying in close contact and making moves together. I trust B, D, F, G, I, J, and C going into this—they all seemed genuine about wanting to cooperate and honest about their own needs. I don't specifically distrust anyone yet, but I'm most cautious about A and E since those connections felt thinner and less committed.
